[@microsoft/fast-element/extensions/observer-map.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [schemaRegistry](../fast-element.schemaregistry/index.html)

## schemaRegistry variable

Module-level registry that maps custom element names to their schema maps. Used for cross-element `$ref` resolution (e.g. nested element schemas). Each Schema instance registers itself here on construction.

**Signature:**

```typescript
schemaRegistry: CachedPathMap
```
